# Copilot Instructions

- Never ask for confirmation before making edits. The used tools will handle this.
- Comments in Lua code should adhere to LuaLS annotations. See the [official docs](https://luals.github.io/wiki/annotations/#documenting-types) for guidance on documenting types and using correct annotation syntax.
- If in doubt about project requirements or logic, consult `docs/project-description.md`.
